Title: Boot Initialization
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-001:
The processing unit shall process instrument data in real time without loss.
Definition: The software shall initialize hardware and enter a safe operational state on startup.

Title: Command Processing
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-007:
The processing unit shall interpret and route commands internally.
Definition: The software shall decode and execute received commands.

Title: Data Acquisition
TopLevel_Definition:
[Via parent: REQ-IPU-001]

REQ-IPU-001:
The processing unit shall process instrument data in real time without loss.

---

[Via parent: REQ-SYS-006]

REQ-IPU-002:
The processing unit shall store at least 24 hours of instrument data.

REQ-IPU-003:
The processing unit shall support required data throughput to spacecraft.

REQ-IPU-004 [DELETED]:
The processing unit shall support required communication interfaces.
Definition: The software shall acquire and buffer instrument data.

Title: Data Processing
TopLevel_Definition:
[Via parent: REQ-IPU-001]

REQ-IPU-001:
The processing unit shall process instrument data in real time without loss.

---

[Via parent: REQ-SYS-006]

REQ-IPU-002:
The processing unit shall store at least 24 hours of instrument data.

REQ-IPU-003:
The processing unit shall support required data throughput to spacecraft.

REQ-IPU-004 [DELETED]:
The processing unit shall support required communication interfaces.
Definition: The software shall process raw data into calibrated outputs.

Title: Memory Management
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-002:
The processing unit shall store at least 24 hours of instrument data.
Definition: The software shall manage memory allocation and prevent overflow.

Title: Mode Management
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-005:
The processing unit shall manage instrument operational modes.
Definition: The software shall control transitions between operational modes.

Title: Mode Tracking
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-INST-003:
The instrument shall support defined operational modes.

REQ-INST-031:
The instrument shall support Tracking of an observation target
Definition: The software shall implement a Tracking procedure

Title: Calibration Algorithms
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-006:
The processing unit shall process calibration data and apply corrections.
Definition: The software shall apply calibration corrections to raw data.

Title: Error Handling
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-IPU-001:
The processing unit shall process instrument data in real time without loss.
Definition: The software shall detect, log, and respond to runtime errors.

Title: Data Pool
Definition: The software shall store and make all parameters for data acquisition available through a dedicated data pool
Notes: All parameters are stored in a data pool

Title: Interface Support
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-INST-001:
The instrument shall provide telemetry to the spacecraft data handling system.
Definition: The processing unit shall support required communication interfaces.

TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-SYS-006:
The spacecraft shall handle, store, and route science and housekeeping data.
Definition: The instrument shall generate science data per defined cycles.

TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-SYS-003:
The spacecraft shall provide sufficient electrical power to all subsystems.
Definition: The instrument shall operate within allocated power budget.

TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-SYS-005:
The spacecraft shall withstand mission environmental conditions.
Definition: The instrument shall operate within spacecraft environmental conditions.

Title: Payload Accommodation
TopLevel_Definition:
REQ-MIS-002:
The mission shall collect quantitative measurements of defined physical parameters.
Definition: The spacecraft shall provide interfaces for payload instruments.
